name: apply_twice

#include <functional>
int apply_twice(function<int(int)> f, int x){ return f(f(x)); }

name: transform_and_total
compose2
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int compose2(function<int(int)> f, function<int(int)> g, int x){ return f(g(x)); }

name: swap_refs
cpp_unit: void swap_refs(long& a, long& b){ long t = a; a = b; b = t; }
mojo_unit:
def swap_refs(mut a: Int, mut b: Int):
    var t = a
    a = b
    b = t
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = 3
    var b = 7
    swap_refs(a, b)
    print(a)
    print(b)

name: increment_inplace
cpp_unit: void increment_inplace(long& x){ x += 1; }
mojo_unit:
def increment_inplace(mut x: Int):
    x += 1
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var x = 41
    increment_inplace(x)
    increment_inplace(x)
    print(x)
